project.name: girlfriend-bot
project.description: Luna AI Girlfriend Chatbot - An interactive AI girlfriend chatbot with emotion simulation, affection system, and firewall protection built with FastAPI and vanilla JavaScript.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Luna v3 Docker Compose configuration defining a single `luna-bot` service. Builds from the local Dockerfile, maps host port 8000 to container port 8000, sets HOST/PORT environment variables, mounts all application files (brain.py, app.py, style.css, script.js, index.html) for live reload during development, configures an HTTP health check against /health, and enables auto-restart unless stopped.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage production Docker image for Luna v3 based on python:3.13-slim. Installs minimal system dependencies (ca-certificates), copies requirements.txt and installs Python packages, copies all application source files (brain.py, app.py, style.css, script.js, index.html), creates a non-root 'app' user for security, exposes port 8000, sets up a periodic HEALTHCHECK, and launches the FastAPI application via uvicorn on 0.0.0.0:8000.

nodes.label: CI Pipeline
nodes.summary: CI pipeline triggered on push and pull_request to main. Runs linting with pyflakes, import validation, firewall tests, brain logic tests, and full API endpoint tests (health, chat, gift, state, reset) across Python 3.13 and 3.14 using a matrix strategy.
nodes.name: ci.yml

nodes.label: Deploy Pipeline
nodes.summary: Manual deploy pipeline (workflow_dispatch) that builds a Docker image using Docker Buildx and pushes it to GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io). Tags are generated from semantic version, a user-supplied input tag, and a short SHA. Uses gha cache mode for layer caching.
nodes.name: deploy.yml

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.summary: Main HTML entry point for the Luna AI Girlfriend Chatbot. Defines the complete UI structure including header with avatar and streak badge, affection/emotion/accordion AI bar, chat message area, typing indicator, quick reply chips, input area with voice and send buttons, milestone popup, achievement toast, gift overlay with send animation, and a full settings modal with four tabs (Personality, Appearance, AI, About). Loads Google Fonts (Nunito), style.css, and script.js.
nodes.name: index.html

nodes.label: style.css
nodes.summary: Complete design system and stylesheet for the Luna AI Girlfriend Chatbot. Contains design tokens (CSS custom properties for colors, typography, spacing, radii, shadows, transitions, z-index layers), global reset and base styles, 14 emoji animation keyframes (bounce, float, pulse, pop, spin, wiggle, dance, shine, rain, confetti, heartbeat) with utility classes, a particle float animation system with burst effects, full component styling for header, avatar, affection bar, emotion tags, AI bar, chat messages (user/bot/system), typing indicator, quick replies, input area with voice/TTS buttons, milestone popup, settings modal with tabs (Personality, Appearance, AI, About), mod grid, theme grid, avatar grid, gift panel with grid, achievement toast, and comprehensive responsive breakpoints for tablet, phone landscape, phone portrait (<480px), and very small phones (<360px). Includes accessibility support via prefers-reduced-motion, prefers-reduced-transparency, prefers-contrast, and print styles.
nodes.name: style.css

nodes.label: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python backend dependency manifest for the Luna AI Girlfriend Chatbot. Declares four core dependencies: fastapi (>=0.110.0) for the REST API server, uvicorn[standard] (>=0.29.0) as the ASGI server, httpx (>=0.27.0) for async HTTP client requests, and pydantic (>=2.0.0) for data validation and settings management. Includes python-multipart for file upload support.
nodes.name: requirements.txt

nodes.label: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore patterns file for the analysis tool, specifying globs to exclude from knowledge-graph scanning. All patterns are commented out by default, providing templates for excluding Python bytecode, test files, and build artifacts.
nodes.name: .understandignore

nodes.label: config.json
nodes.summary: Analysis tool configuration specifying outputLanguage as English for all generated knowledge graph content.
nodes.name: config.json

nodes.label: app.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI backend for the Luna AI Girlfriend Chatbot. Defines REST endpoints for chat, gift sending, session state, reset, and health checks. Integrates Groq AI API for AI-powered responses with a local fallback. Manages in-memory sessions, XP/affection system, emotions, achievements, streak tracking, and firewall protection against prompt injection.
nodes.name: app.py

nodes.label: brain.py
nodes.summary: Core chatbot intelligence engine containing the Brain class with static methods for text optimization, intent detection, sentiment analysis, topic extraction, response planning, local response building, emotion modulation, memory extraction, and AI system prompt generation. Also provides standalone modules for emotion updates, affection/XP progression, streak management, achievement checking, and firewall security.
nodes.name: brain.py

nodes.label: script.js
nodes.summary: Frontend client for the Luna AI Girlfriend Chatbot implemented as an IIFE exposing the LUNA global object. Contains the full interactive UI: chat rendering, emotion/affection system, local/groq/backend chat modes, gift system, voice recognition, text-to-speech, settings panel with personality mods/themes/avatars, achievement toasts, milestone popups, streak tracking, memory extraction, particle animations, confetti effects, and a client-side firewall against prompt injection.
nodes.name: script.js

nodes.label: SettingsModel
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for chatbot configuration including personality, girl/pet name, user gender, custom persona, Groq API connection settings, avatar, theme, particles, and temperature.
nodes.name: app.py/SettingsModel

nodes.label: ChatRequest
nodes.summary: Pydantic request model for the /chat endpoint with session_id, message text, and optional settings.
nodes.name: app.py/ChatRequest

nodes.label: ChatResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic response model for the /chat endpoint returning session_id, response text, state snapshot, and new achievements.
nodes.name: app.py/ChatResponse

nodes.label: GiftRequest
nodes.summary: Pydantic request model for the /gift endpoint with session_id, emoji, name, and XP value.
nodes.name: app.py/GiftRequest

nodes.label: GiftResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic response model for the /gift endpoint returning session_id, reaction text, state, and new achievements.
nodes.name: app.py/GiftResponse

nodes.label: StateResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic response model for the /state endpoint returning session_id and full state snapshot.
nodes.name: app.py/StateResponse

nodes.label: Brain
nodes.summary: Core chatbot intelligence class with 12 static methods covering text optimization, intent detection (20+ intents), sentiment analysis, topic extraction (11 domains), context analysis, strategic response planning, local response building from pools, emotion/personality modulation, memory extraction, and AI system prompt generation with full state context.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain

nodes.label: Brain.optimize
nodes.summary: Normalizes casual speech and slang in user input (u→you, gonna→going to, lol→haha, etc.), condenses excessive repeated characters and punctuation.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.optimize

nodes.label: Brain.detect_intent
nodes.summary: Detects primary user intent from text using regex pattern matching across 20+ categories including greeting, love, miss, sorry, joke, food, compliment, goodbye, sad, tired, sleepy, stressed, happy, help, thanks, deep, tease, bored, and more.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.detect_intent

nodes.label: Brain.sentiment
nodes.summary: Rule-based sentiment analysis returning positive, negative, or neutral based on keyword scoring.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.sentiment

nodes.label: Brain.topics
nodes.summary: Extracts conversation topics (work, food, entertainment, gaming, social, travel, health, music, education, weather, finance) from user text using regex patterns.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.topics

nodes.label: Brain.analyze
nodes.summary: Full context analysis returning sentiment, topics, is_question flag, has_emoji, word_count, complexity (long/short), urgency (high/normal/low), and detected intent.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.analyze

nodes.label: Brain.plan
nodes.summary: Strategic response planning: determines strategy (comfort/amplify/normal), dominant emotion, and flags for needs_comfort, needs_celebration, keep_short.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.plan

nodes.label: Brain.build_local_response
nodes.summary: Builds response from predefined text pools using a priority system: emotional intents first, then topic-specific, then standard intent fallback, then sentiment fallback.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.build_local_response

nodes.label: Brain.modulate_response
nodes.summary: Applies emotion and personality modulation to response text: adds emotional suffixes/prefixes based on dominant emotion value and personality mod (tsundere, energetic, etc.).
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.modulate_response

nodes.label: Brain.extract_memories
nodes.summary: Extracts factual memories from user text including name, likes/dislikes, events, and feelings using regex patterns.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.extract_memories

nodes.label: Brain.get_sys_prompt
nodes.summary: Builds a comprehensive system prompt for the Groq AI LLM call incorporating personality mod, relationship level, emotions, memories, time context, sentiment analysis, topics, and character instructions.
nodes.name: brain.py/Brain.get_sys_prompt

nodes.label: pick
nodes.summary: Utility function returning a random item from a list. Used throughout for random response selection.
nodes.name: brain.py/pick

nodes.label: _get_aff
nodes.summary: Internal helper mapping XP to affection level by iterating through AFF_LEVELS.
nodes.name: brain.py/_get_aff

nodes.label: firewall_check
nodes.summary: Checks user message against firewall patterns to block prompt injection, system prompt extraction, jailbreak, and character-breaking attempts. Returns (blocked, category, reply).
nodes.name: brain.py/firewall_check

nodes.label: update_emos
nodes.summary: Updates emotion values based on detected intent: applies decay toward base value, boosts triggered emotions, and clamps between 0.01 and 1.0.
nodes.name: brain.py/update_emos

nodes.label: get_top_emo
nodes.summary: Returns the currently dominant emotion (highest value) from state, falling back to default Happy.
nodes.name: brain.py/get_top_emo

nodes.label: get_affection
nodes.summary: Gets affection level dict for a given XP value.
nodes.name: brain.py/get_affection

nodes.label: get_affection_progress
nodes.summary: Calculates percentage progress towards the next affection level.
nodes.name: brain.py/get_affection_progress

nodes.label: add_xp
nodes.summary: Adds XP to state, caps at MAX_XP, detects level-up milestones, and returns {new_xp, milestone}.
nodes.name: brain.py/add_xp

nodes.label: check_streak
nodes.summary: Checks and updates daily chat streak: determines if streak continues or resets, claims daily XP bonus, tracks longest_streak.
nodes.name: brain.py/check_streak

nodes.label: check_achievements
nodes.summary: Checks all achievements against current state, returns newly unlocked ones (without lambda check function).
nodes.name: brain.py/check_achievements

nodes.label: add_memory
nodes.summary: Extracts memories from user text using Brain.extract_memories, deduplicates by text similarity, caps at 30 entries.
nodes.name: brain.py/add_memory

nodes.label: default_state
nodes.summary: Creates a fresh default chatbot state dictionary with all fields: emotions (initialized at 0.5), XP, message count, memory, streak, achievements, personality, avatar, theme settings.
nodes.name: brain.py/default_state

nodes.label: get_or_create_session
nodes.summary: Retrieves existing session by ID or creates a new one with default state and a generated UUID.
nodes.name: app.py/get_or_create_session

nodes.label: _apply_settings
nodes.summary: Applies SettingsModel fields to session state including personality, names, avatar, theme, API key, model, temperature.
nodes.name: app.py/_apply_settings

nodes.label: _build_client_state
nodes.summary: Builds a client-facing state snapshot from session state, excluding chat history, with affection level, progress, streak, and all display fields.
nodes.name: app.py/_build_client_state

nodes.label: call_groq
nodes.summary: Async function calling the Groq API for AI-powered responses. Builds messages from system prompt and history, sends POST request with configurable model, temperature, max_tokens.
nodes.name: app.py/call_groq

nodes.label: _calc_xp
nodes.summary: Calculates XP gain based on intent: love/miss/compliment/happy=8, sorry/sad/stressed=10, joke/tease=5, greeting/thanks=4, goodbye=1, default=3.
nodes.name: app.py/_calc_xp

nodes.label: chat
nodes.summary: Main /chat POST endpoint. Processes message through: streak check, love/sorry counters, firewall check, Brain text optimization/intent/analysis/plan, memory extraction, Groq AI or local response generation, history update, emotion update, XP gain, achievement check. Returns ChatResponse.
nodes.name: app.py/chat

nodes.label: send_gift
nodes.summary: POST /gift endpoint. Increments gift count, adds XP, selects gift reaction from predefined messages by emoji type, checks achievements.
nodes.name: app.py/send_gift

nodes.label: get_state
nodes.summary: GET /state endpoint. Returns current session state or fresh default if session not found.
nodes.name: app.py/get_state

nodes.label: reset_session
nodes.summary: POST /reset endpoint. Resets session to default state or creates new session.
nodes.name: app.py/reset_session

nodes.label: health
nodes.summary: GET /health endpoint returning service status, version, and active session count.
nodes.name: app.py/health

nodes.label: defaultState
nodes.summary: Returns a fresh default state object for the frontend with mode, mod, emotion, affection, XP, name, avatar, message/gift counts, unlocked emotions, memories, achievements, streak, and user settings.
nodes.name: script.js/defaultState

nodes.label: cacheDOM
nodes.summary: Caches all frequently-used DOM element references into a DOM object for performance: avatar, header, chat area, input, buttons, overlays, modal panels, and animation containers.
nodes.name: script.js/cacheDOM

nodes.label: saveState
nodes.summary: Persists current state and last 100 chat history entries to localStorage under 'luna_state' key.
nodes.name: script.js/saveState

nodes.label: loadState
nodes.summary: Loads and merges saved state from localStorage with default state to handle new fields introduced in updates.
nodes.name: script.js/loadState

nodes.label: applyTheme
nodes.summary: Applies a theme (default/sunset/ocean/forest/lavender/midnight/sakura/honey) by injecting CSS custom properties for body gradient, header, affection bar, buttons, and hover states.
nodes.name: script.js/applyTheme

nodes.label: updateUI
nodes.summary: Master UI update function calling updateAffection, updateEmotionBar, updateAvatar, updateName, updateStreakBadge, updateInputState, updateAIBarState, and updateModeBadge.
nodes.name: script.js/updateUI

nodes.label: updateAffection
nodes.summary: Updates affection display: finds current level from AFF_LEVELS, calculates percentage, updates fill bar width, label text, and icon.
nodes.name: script.js/updateAffection

nodes.label: updateEmotionBar
nodes.summary: Renders the emotion bar showing all 10 emotions with their emoji icons. Active and unlocked emotions are labeled; locked ones show '???'.
nodes.name: script.js/updateEmotionBar

nodes.label: detectEmotion
nodes.summary: Detects user emotion from text by checking EMO_TRIGGERS keyword lists. Returns the first matching emotion ID or null.
nodes.name: script.js/detectEmotion

nodes.label: updateEmotion
nodes.summary: Sets the current emotion, unlocks it if new, checks 'all_emos' achievement, and refreshes UI.
nodes.name: script.js/updateEmotion

nodes.label: addXP
nodes.summary: Adds XP, converts to affection at 1.2x rate, handles level-up thresholds (starting at 100, incrementing by 50, max 5000), checks XP achievements, saves state, updates UI.
nodes.name: script.js/addXP

nodes.label: checkStreak
nodes.summary: Checks daily streak continuity: increments if yesterday, resets otherwise. Triggers streak achievements at 2, 5, 7 days. Saves and updates UI.
nodes.name: script.js/checkStreak

nodes.label: checkAchievement
nodes.summary: Checks and unlocks an achievement by ID, awards its XP, shows toast notification.
nodes.name: script.js/checkAchievement

nodes.label: showAchievementToast
nodes.summary: Shows a toast notification for newly unlocked achievements with icon, name, description, and XP reward. Auto-hides after 3 seconds and triggers confetti burst.
nodes.name: script.js/showAchievementToast

nodes.label: extractMemories
nodes.summary: Extracts memories from user messages containing trigger keywords (i love, i like, i hate, etc.). Deduplicates, caps at 10 for achievement check.
nodes.name: script.js/extractMemories

nodes.label: showMilestone
nodes.summary: Shows a milestone popup with emoji, title, description. Auto-dismisses after 6 seconds or on button click. Triggers confetti burst.
nodes.name: script.js/showMilestone

nodes.label: addMessage
nodes.summary: Renders a chat message bubble (user/bot/sys) with TTS button for bot messages, timestamp, reaction buttons (❤️😂🥰😊🔥), and animation. Saves to chatHistory.
nodes.name: script.js/addMessage

nodes.label: getLocalResponse
nodes.summary: Local chatbot response generator: classifies input into categories (greetings, love, hugs, sad, angry, etc.) using keyword matching, with personality mod overrides (tsundere, yandere, dere, kuudere, genki, mama, ojou, pervert). Returns random response from selected pool.
nodes.name: script.js/getLocalResponse

nodes.label: firewallCheck
nodes.summary: Client-side firewall checking user input against EXTRACT_PROMPT, BREAK_CHARACTER, EXTRACT_KNOWLEDGE, and JAILBREAK pattern sets. Returns {blocked, category, reply} or null.
nodes.name: script.js/firewallCheck

nodes.label: processMessage
nodes.summary: Main message processing pipeline: adds user message, runs firewall check, updates local state (streak, memories, emotion, XP, achievements), shows typing indicator, generates response via groq/backend/local, adds bot message, checks affection milestones, saves state.
nodes.name: script.js/processMessage

nodes.label: groqChat
nodes.summary: Calls Groq AI API with system prompt and chat history. Constructs messages array, sends POST to /openai/v1/chat/completions with configurable model, returns AI response text.
nodes.name: script.js/groqChat

nodes.label: backendChat
nodes.summary: Calls backend /chat endpoint with full settings payload. On success, syncs frontend state with backend response: emotion, XP/affection, streak, memories, achievements, message count, personality, name, avatar. Also handles new achievement toasts.
nodes.name: script.js/backendChat

nodes.label: sendGift
nodes.summary: Sends a gift: plays fly animation, calls backend /gift endpoint if in backend mode (syncing state), or falls back to local handler. Updates emotion, triggers confetti.
nodes.name: script.js/sendGift

nodes.label: fallbackGift
nodes.summary: Local gift handling: increments gift count, awards XP, checks gift achievements, picks random response from GIFT_RESPONSES, shows typing indicator, updates emotion to happy.
nodes.name: script.js/fallbackGift

nodes.label: setupVoice
nodes.summary: Initializes Web Speech API speech recognition. Sets up onresult (sends recognized text), onerror, and onend handlers. Hides voice button if unsupported.
nodes.name: script.js/setupVoice

nodes.label: setupTTS
nodes.summary: Initializes text-to-speech: finds a female English voice via speechSynthesis, falling back to any English voice.
nodes.name: script.js/setupTTS

nodes.label: speakText
nodes.summary: Text-to-speech using SpeechSynthesisUtterance. Cleans text of emojis/special chars, uses female English voice at rate 1.0/pitch 1.2. Toggle on/off on repeat call.
nodes.name: script.js/speakText

nodes.label: renderModGrid
nodes.summary: Renders personality mod selection grid (gentle, tsundere, yandere, dere, kuudere, genki, mama, ojou, pervert) with emoji, label, description. Highlights active mod.
nodes.name: script.js/renderModGrid

nodes.label: saveSettings
nodes.summary: Saves settings from modal form fields: name, user name, AI key/model, backend URL, TTS toggle. Auto-detects mode (backend > groq > local). Updates UI and closes settings.
nodes.name: script.js/saveSettings

nodes.label: spawnParticles
nodes.summary: Creates 15 floating background particles with random emojis (🌸💕✨🌺 etc.), random positions, sizes, durations, and low opacity for ambient decoration.
nodes.name: script.js/spawnParticles

nodes.label: spawnConfettiBurst
nodes.summary: Creates a confetti burst animation at the center of a container: 12 particles explode outward with random angles, distances, and emojis. Cleans up after 1.2s.
nodes.name: script.js/spawnConfettiBurst

nodes.label: spawnEmojiRain
nodes.summary: Creates 20 emoji elements falling from top of screen with random sizes, positions, and delays for a festive welcome effect.
nodes.name: script.js/spawnEmojiRain

nodes.label: setupKeyboard
nodes.summary: Sets up keyboard shortcut: Escape closes settings modal, gift overlay, and milestone popup.
nodes.name: script.js/setupKeyboard

nodes.label: setupInput
nodes.summary: Sets up chat input: auto-resizes height on input, sends message on Enter (Shift+Enter for newline).
nodes.name: script.js/setupInput

nodes.label: init
nodes.summary: Main entry point: caches DOM, loads saved state, applies theme, sets up input/voice/TTS/settings tabs/keyboard, renders quick replies and gift grid, restores chat history or shows welcome messages, starts particles and emoji rain.
nodes.name: script.js/init

nodes.label: LUNA.init
nodes.summary: Public API: delegates to internal init function.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.init

nodes.label: LUNA.sendMessage
nodes.summary: Public API: reads input, validates, clears input, calls processMessage.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.sendMessage

nodes.label: LUNA.openSettings
nodes.summary: Public API: opens the settings modal and renders settings content.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.openSettings

nodes.label: LUNA.closeSettings
nodes.summary: Public API: closes the settings modal.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.closeSettings

nodes.label: LUNA.saveSettings
nodes.summary: Public API: saves settings from modal form fields.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.saveSettings

nodes.label: LUNA.toggleAIBar
nodes.summary: Public API: toggles the AI bar (backend/Groq connection panel).
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.toggleAIBar

nodes.label: LUNA.connectBackend
nodes.summary: Public API: connects to backend URL from input field.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.connectBackend

nodes.label: LUNA.disconnectBackend
nodes.summary: Public API: disconnects from backend and falls back to groq/local mode.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.disconnectBackend

nodes.label: LUNA.toggleVoice
nodes.summary: Public API: toggles voice recognition on/off.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.toggleVoice

nodes.label: LUNA.speakText
nodes.summary: Public API: speaks provided text via TTS.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.speakText

nodes.label: LUNA.openGiftPanel
nodes.summary: Public API: opens the gift selection panel.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.openGiftPanel

nodes.label: LUNA.closeGiftPanel
nodes.summary: Public API: closes the gift selection panel.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.closeGiftPanel

nodes.label: LUNA.sendGift
nodes.summary: Public API: sends a gift by emoji identifier.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.sendGift

nodes.label: LUNA.uploadAvatar
nodes.summary: Public API: handles avatar image file upload.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.uploadAvatar

nodes.label: LUNA.spawnConfettiBurst
nodes.summary: Public API: triggers confetti burst animation.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.spawnConfettiBurst

nodes.label: LUNA.spawnEmojiRain
nodes.summary: Public API: triggers emoji rain animation.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.spawnEmojiRain

nodes.label: LUNA.changeMod
nodes.summary: Public API: changes personality mod by ID, saves and updates UI.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.changeMod

nodes.label: LUNA.setMode
nodes.summary: Public API: sets chat mode to local/groq/backend, saves and updates UI.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.setMode

nodes.label: LUNA.getState
nodes.summary: Public API: returns a copy of the current application state.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.getState

nodes.label: LUNA.resetState
nodes.summary: Public API: resets all state to defaults, clears history and localStorage, shows welcome message.
nodes.name: script.js/LUNA.resetState

edges.notes: docker-compose builds the luna-bot image from the local Dockerfile via `build: .`
Dockerfile copies app.py (FastAPI application entry point) into the container
Dockerfile copies brain.py (AI chatbot logic and emotion simulation) into the container
Dockerfile copies style.css (chat UI styling) into the container
Dockerfile copies script.js (frontend chat interaction logic) into the container
Dockerfile copies index.html (chat interface HTML) into the container

edges.label: CI tests code that is Dockerized
Deploy builds Docker image from Dockerfile
configures
edges.summary: requirements.txt declares the Python dependencies (fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, pydantic, python-multipart) that app.py imports and uses for the backend API server

edges.label: configures
edges.summary: requirements.txt declares the Python dependencies (fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, pydantic, python-multipart) that brain.py imports and uses for AI/business logic

edges.label: depends_on
edges.summary: index.html links style.css via <link rel='stylesheet' href='style.css'> for all visual styling

edges.label: depends_on
edges.summary: index.html loads script.js via <script defer src='script.js'></script> for all interactive behavior

edges.label: depends_on
edges.summary: script.js depends on style.css for visual styling of UI components it manipulates

edges.label: related
edges.summary: index.html and style.css are related frontend files that together form the chatbot's user interface layer

layers.name: Infrastructure Layer
layers.description: Containerization and deployment definitions — Dockerfile for building the image and docker-compose.yml for orchestrating the service.

layers.name: Backend API Layer
layers.description: FastAPI Python backend — app.py defines HTTP endpoints for chat, gifts, session management, and health checks; brain.py implements core chatbot intelligence with emotion simulation, personalities, and response logic.

layers.name: Frontend UI Layer
layers.description: Browser-based chatbot interface — index.html (entry point), style.css (design system with animations and responsiveness), and script.js (client logic with 3 chat modes, voice TTS, and animation engine).

layers.name: CI/CD Layer
layers.description: Automated pipeline definitions — ci.yml runs matrix testing (lint, firewall, brain logic, API endpoints) on push; deploy.yml builds and pushes a Docker image to GHCR on manual trigger.

layers.name: Configuration Layer
layers.description: Project configuration and dependency files — requirements.txt (Python dependencies), .understand-anything/config.json (codebase analysis tool settings), and .understand-anything/.understandignore (ignore patterns for analysis).

tour.title: Backend API Entry Point — app.py
tour.description: Start here: the FastAPI server is the backbone of the entire application. It defines 8 HTTP endpoints (chat, gift, session, reset, health) that the frontend calls. Note how it imports `brain.py` for all AI logic and manages Groq API credentials. This file is the primary bridge between the user interface and the chatbot intelligence — every message a user sends flows through this server first.

tour.title: Core AI Logic — brain.py
tour.description: Imported directly by app.py, this is the heart of the chatbot. It contains 6 personalities, 10 emotion states, 10 affection levels, and 28 response categories — all defining how 'Luna' behaves. Also includes firewall detection (filtering toxic input) and an achievement system. Understanding this file explains how app.py's chat endpoint generates responses.

tour.title: Python Dependencies — requirements.txt
tour.description: This document configures both app.py and brain.py by listing the Python packages they rely on: FastAPI for the web framework, uvicorn as the ASGI server, httpx for async HTTP calls (used by brain.py for Groq API access), pydantic for data validation, and python-multipart for form data. It's the manifest that makes the backend layer run.

tour.title: Frontend HTML Structure — index.html
tour.description: Now we move from backend to frontend. This HTML file is what users actually see and interact with. It declares the DOM structure for the header, affection bar, chat message area, quick reply buttons, text input, and a settings modal. Note the script and link tags that wire in script.js and style.css — this is where the frontend triad connects.

tour.title: Design System & Animations — style.css
tour.description: Referenced by both index.html and script.js, this stylesheet defines the entire visual language of the chatbot interface. It contains 14 animation keyframes (for message entry, avatar bounce, heart float effects), responsive breakpoints, accessibility rules, and component-level styles. The design system gives Luna her personality through motion and color.

tour.title: Client-Side Chat Engine — script.js
tour.description: The JavaScript engine that brings the UI to life. It supports 3 chat modes (Local, Groq, Backend) which determine where messages are processed, features an animation engine, voice/TTS support, and 20+ UI interaction methods. This file depends on style.css for animations and connects to index.html's DOM elements. It also calls the app.py backend endpoints for the Backend mode.

tour.title: Container Image — Dockerfile
tour.description: Now we look at how the project is packaged and deployed. The Dockerfile creates a production image from python:3.13-slim, installs system dependencies, copies all source files (app.py, brain.py, index.html, style.css, script.js), creates a non-root user, and launches the FastAPI server via uvicorn on port 8000. It is the central hub of the infrastructure layer — every pipeline and compose configuration depends on it.

tour.title: Service Orchestration — docker-compose.yml
tour.description: The Docker Compose file builds from the Dockerfile and adds runtime configuration: port mapping (8000), volume mounts for live reload during development, health checks, and auto-restart policy. It configures how the containerized app actually runs as a service. The deploy pipeline depends on this to test the full stack.

tour.title: Continuous Integration — ci.yml
tour.description: The final layer: automation. The CI pipeline runs on every push or PR to main with a matrix testing strategy across Python 3.13 and 3.14. It executes linting, firewall tests (validating brain.py's input filtering), brain logic tests, and API endpoint tests against app.py. It also triggers the deploy pipeline on success, completing the automation chain.

tour.title: Continuous Deployment — deploy.yml
tour.description: The deployment pipeline is manually triggered and builds the Docker image from the Dockerfile, then pushes it to GitHub Container Registry with semantic version, input, and SHA tags. This is the final step in the delivery pipeline — it takes the tested code from CI and makes it available as a deployable container image.
